medicationCodeableConcept.text: HYDROcodone bitartrate 7.5 MG / acetaminophen 325 MG Oral Tablet

text.div:
Care Plan for Fracture care.
Activities:
  • Fracture care
  • Fracture care

Care plan is meant to treat Fracture of forearm.
